task: Added lightweight memory inbox ingestion and MCP server inventory support to context-orchestrator
notes: Memory summaries now go through the shared artifact format so multiple clients can submit findings without a client-specific schema fork.
MCP server inventory is now indexed from generic JSON and Codex TOML config sources, with repo-aware discovery and freshness reporting.
HAM is useful as inspiration for scoped memory and inbox ideas, but its Claude-only runtime assumptions were intentionally not copied.
outcome: The orchestrator now supports searchable MCP server inventories, client-agnostic memory summary ingestion, and context packs that surface MCP/tooling hits alongside docs, skills, and memory.
